title: Add synchronized_hop_channel to protocol.py matching spec SelectChannel pseudocode + independent hash_32 oracle
description: Implement deterministic hop_channel(sfn: int, eui64: bytes, num_channels: int=8, epoch: int=0) -> int using FNV hash_32(CONCAT(EUI BE, epoch LE u32)) % N +1 per 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:120-125 and ccp16-hop.json. Use _hash_32 from generate.py as oracle (never code-under-test). Update docstring with file:line ref. No dead code.
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks project-LICHEN-vhvj.4.1 project-LICHEN-vhvj.4.2 project-LICHEN-vhvj.4.3 project-LICHEN-vhvj.4.4
